name: withu-discord-bot
description: this repo is discord BOT for withU project.

scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: sentry-cli sourcemaps inject --org planet-bot-project --project withu-discord-bot ./index.js && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org planet-bot-project --project withu-discord-bot ./index.js
scripts.docker:down: docker-compose down --rmi all --volumes --remove-orphans && docker builder prune -af

author: Hoshimikan6490
